description_long: This motorcycle features a robust, low-slung frame with a large, wide rear tire and a slightly smaller front tire, both with prominent treads. The body is predominantly matte black with metallic silver accents on the engine, exhaust, and wheel rims, giving it a modern, aggressive look. The seat is contoured and padded, designed for a single rider, and the handlebars are wide and slightly raised, suggesting a cruiser or custom style. The engine is exposed, with visible mechanical components and a large exhaust system running along the side. Saddlebags or storage compartments are mounted on either side of the rear wheel, adding utility for urban commuting. The overall design emphasizes stability, comfort, and a bold street presence, suitable for city roads and highways.
description: A matte black and silver motorcycle with wide tires, exposed engine, and side-mounted saddlebags, designed for urban riding and comfort.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide handlebars, contoured seat, and the large front tire with visible treads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the exposed engine, large rear tire, and the side-mounted saddlebag.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual saddlebags, rear tire, and the back of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust system, engine details, and the right saddlebag.
